proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients not receiving `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`.
Patients receiving `treatment_7plus3` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients not receiving `treatment_7plus3`.
Patients receiving `treatment_midostaurin` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients not receiving `treatment_midostaurin`.
Patients receiving `treatment_gilteritinib` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients not receiving `treatment_gilteritinib`.
Patients receiving `treatment_ivosidenib` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients not receiving `treatment_ivosidenib`.
Patients receiving `treatment_enasidenib` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients not receiving `treatment_enasidenib`.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 0.2196 on venetoclax-azacitidine versus 0.1661 off treatment; risk difference +0.0535.
Response was 0.1889 on 7+3 versus 0.1863 off treatment; risk difference +0.0026.
Response was 0.1857 on midostaurin versus 0.1878 off treatment; risk difference -0.0021.
Response was 0.1813 on gilteritinib versus 0.1886 off treatment; risk difference -0.0073.
Response was 0.1882 on ivosidenib versus 0.1874 off treatment; risk difference +0.0007.
Response was 0.1858 on enasidenib versus 0.1877 off treatment; risk difference -0.0018.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `npm1_mutation` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients without `npm1_mutation`.
Patients with `tp53_mutation` have lower mean `objective_response` than patients without `tp53_mutation`.
Patients with `complex_karyotype` have lower mean `objective_response` than patients without `complex_karyotype`.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 0.2347 with NPM1 mutation versus 0.1673 without; risk difference +0.0674.
Response was 0.1657 with TP53 mutation versus 0.1899 without; risk difference -0.0242.
Response was 0.1681 with complex karyotype versus 0.1909 without; risk difference -0.0229.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `flt3_itd` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients without `flt3_itd`.
Patients with `flt3_tkd` have lower mean `objective_response` than patients without `flt3_tkd`.
Patients with `idh1_mutation` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients without `idh1_mutation`.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 0.1892 with FLT3-ITD versus 0.1871 without; risk difference +0.0021.
Response was 0.1805 with FLT3-TKD versus 0.1879 without; risk difference -0.0075.
Response was 0.1910 with IDH1 mutation versus 0.1872 without; risk difference +0.0037.
Response was 0.1915 with IDH2 mutation versus 0.1871 without; risk difference +0.0044.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-standard-deviation increase in `ecog_ps` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.
Patients with `unfit_for_intensive` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients without `unfit_for_intensive`.
A one-standard-deviation increase in `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.
A one-standard-deviation increase in `blast_pct_marrow` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted linear-probability coefficient per SD of ECOG was -0.0354.
Response was 0.2210 in unfit patients versus 0.1651 in fit patients; risk difference +0.0559.
Unadjusted linear-probability coefficient per SD of weight loss was -0.0201.
Unadjusted linear-probability coefficient per SD of marrow blast percentage was -0.0143.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-standard-deviation increase in `albumin_g_dl` is associated with higher mean `objective_response`.
A one-standard-deviation increase in `crp_mg_l` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.
A one-standard-deviation increase in `wbc_k_per_ul` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.
A one-standard-deviation increase in `ldh_u_l` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted linear-probability coefficient per SD of albumin was +0.0090.
Unadjusted linear-probability coefficient per SD of CRP was -0.0079.
Unadjusted linear-probability coefficient per SD of WBC was -0.0065.
Unadjusted linear-probability coefficient per SD of LDH was -0.0016.
Unadjusted linear-probability coefficient per SD of NLR was -0.0002.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-standard-deviation increase in `age_years` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.
Patients with `sex_female` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients with `sex_female` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted linear-probability coefficient per SD of age was -0.0003.
Response was 0.1891 in female patients versus 0.1862 in non-female patients; risk difference +0.0029.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` on `objective_response` is larger in patients with `unfit_for_intensive` than in patients without `unfit_for_intensive`.

analyses.result_summary: Difference-in-differences interaction was +0.1528: venetoclax-azacitidine risk difference was +0.1451 in unfit patients and -0.0077 in fit patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` on `objective_response` is larger in patients with `npm1_mutation` than in patients without `npm1_mutation`.

analyses.result_summary: Difference-in-differences interaction was +0.1908: venetoclax-azacitidine risk difference was +0.1869 in NPM1-mutated patients and -0.0039 in NPM1-wildtype patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` on `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `tp53_mutation` than in patients without `tp53_mutation`.
The benefit of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` on `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `complex_karyotype` than in patients without `complex_karyotype`.

analyses.result_summary: Difference-in-differences interaction was -0.0636: venetoclax-azacitidine risk difference was -0.0036 in TP53-mutated patients and +0.0600 in TP53-wildtype patients.
Difference-in-differences interaction was -0.0494: venetoclax-azacitidine risk difference was +0.0115 with complex karyotype and +0.0609 without complex karyotype.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for treatments, genetics, and clinical features, the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `unfit_for_intensive` interaction remains positive for `objective_response`.
After adjusting for treatments, genetics, and clinical features, the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `npm1_mutation` interaction remains positive for `objective_response`.
After adjusting for treatments, genetics, and clinical features, the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `tp53_mutation` interaction remains negative for `objective_response`.
After adjusting for treatments, genetics, and clinical features, the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `complex_karyotype` interaction remains negative for `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted linear-probability interaction coefficient was +0.1535.
Adjusted linear-probability interaction coefficient was +0.1919.
Adjusted linear-probability interaction coefficient was -0.0721.
Adjusted linear-probability interaction coefficient was -0.0519.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of `treatment_7plus3` on `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `complex_karyotype` than in patients without `complex_karyotype`.
The benefit of `treatment_7plus3` on `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `unfit_for_intensive` than in patients without `unfit_for_intensive`.
The benefit of `treatment_7plus3` on `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `age_years` at least 70 than in younger patients.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted interaction was -0.0304: 7+3 risk difference was -0.0232 with complex karyotype and +0.0072 without complex karyotype.
Adjusted interaction coefficient remained negative at -0.0320.
Difference-in-differences interaction was -0.0037; 7+3 did not show meaningful effect modification by unfit status.
Difference-in-differences interaction for age at least 70 was +0.0005, not negative.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of `treatment_midostaurin` on `objective_response` is larger in patients with `flt3_itd` than in patients without `flt3_itd`.
The benefit of `treatment_midostaurin` on `objective_response` is larger in patients with `flt3_tkd` than in patients without `flt3_tkd`.
The benefit of `treatment_gilteritinib` on `objective_response` is larger in patients with `flt3_itd` than in patients without `flt3_itd`.
The benefit of `treatment_gilteritinib` on `objective_response` is larger in patients with `flt3_tkd` than in patients without `flt3_tkd`.

analyses.result_summary: Midostaurin by FLT3-ITD interaction was -0.0160; not a positive matched-biomarker effect.
Midostaurin by FLT3-TKD interaction was -0.0033; not significant.
Gilteritinib by FLT3-ITD interaction was +0.0119 but not significant.
Gilteritinib by FLT3-TKD interaction was -0.0293; not significant and opposite to the hypothesized direction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of `treatment_ivosidenib` on `objective_response` is larger in patients with `idh1_mutation` than in patients without `idh1_mutation`.
The benefit of `treatment_enasidenib` on `objective_response` is larger in patients with `idh2_mutation` than in patients without `idh2_mutation`.

analyses.result_summary: Ivosidenib by IDH1 interaction was -0.0439, near nominal significance but opposite the hypothesized positive direction.
Enasidenib by IDH2 interaction was +0.0061 and not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In an adjusted main-effects model, `npm1_mutation` is associated with higher mean `objective_response`.
In an adjusted main-effects model, `tp53_mutation` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.
In an adjusted main-effects model, `complex_karyotype` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.
In an adjusted main-effects model, `secondary_aml` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.
In an adjusted model, a one-standard-deviation increase in `ecog_ps` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.
In an adjusted model, a one-standard-deviation increase in `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.
In an adjusted model, a one-standard-deviation increase in `blast_pct_marrow` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.
In an adjusted model, a one-standard-deviation increase in `albumin_g_dl` is associated with higher mean `objective_response`.
In an adjusted model, a one-standard-deviation increase in `crp_mg_l` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.
In an adjusted model, a one-standard-deviation increase in `wbc_k_per_ul` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for NPM1 mutation was +0.0675.
Adjusted coefficient for TP53 mutation was -0.0263.
Adjusted coefficient for complex karyotype was -0.0239.
Adjusted coefficient for secondary AML was +0.0004, not lower and not significant.
Adjusted coefficient per SD of ECOG was -0.0354.
Adjusted coefficient per SD of weight loss was -0.0201.
Adjusted coefficient per SD of marrow blasts was -0.0147.
Adjusted coefficient per SD of albumin was +0.0091.
Adjusted coefficient per SD of CRP was -0.0078.
Adjusted coefficient per SD of WBC was -0.0066.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adding venetoclax-azacitidine interactions, `unfit_for_intensive` itself is associated with slightly lower mean `objective_response` outside the interaction terms.
After adding venetoclax-azacitidine interactions, `npm1_mutation` itself is associated with lower mean `objective_response` outside the interaction terms.
In the adjusted interaction model, a one-standard-deviation increase in `age_years` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.
In the adjusted interaction model, patients with `sex_female` have higher mean `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: In the adjusted interaction model, the unfit main-effect coefficient was -0.0050 and was not significant.
In the adjusted interaction model, the NPM1 main-effect coefficient was -0.0094, while the venetoclax by NPM1 interaction was strongly positive.
Adjusted interaction-model coefficient per SD of age was -0.0002 and not significant.
Adjusted interaction-model coefficient for female sex was +0.0038 and not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `chronic_kidney_disease` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients without `chronic_kidney_disease`.
Patients with `atrial_fibrillation` have lower mean `objective_response` than patients without `atrial_fibrillation`.
Patients with `autoimmune_disease` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients without `autoimmune_disease`.
Patients with `liver_mets` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients without `liver_mets`.
Patients with `her2_amplification` have lower mean `objective_response` than patients without `her2_amplification`.
Patients with `ros1_fusion` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients without `ros1_fusion`.

analyses.result_summary: Response difference for chronic kidney disease was +0.0090 and was not significant.
Response difference for atrial fibrillation was -0.0115 and was not significant.
Response difference for autoimmune disease was +0.0156 and was not significant at 0.05.
Response difference for liver metastases was +0.0063 and was not significant.
Response difference for HER2 amplification was -0.0064 and was not significant.
Response difference for ROS1 fusion was +0.0070 and was not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of `treatment_enasidenib` on `objective_response` is larger in patients with `sex_female` than in patients with `sex_female` equal to 0.
The benefit of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` on `objective_response` is larger in patients with `heart_failure` than in patients without `heart_failure`.
The benefit of `treatment_gilteritinib` on `objective_response` is larger in patients with `unfit_for_intensive` than in patients without `unfit_for_intensive`.
The benefit of `treatment_ivosidenib` on `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `unfit_for_intensive` than in patients without `unfit_for_intensive`.

analyses.result_summary: Exploratory scan found an enasidenib by female-sex interaction of +0.0478: treatment difference +0.0245 in female patients and -0.0233 in non-female patients.
Exploratory scan found a venetoclax-azacitidine by heart-failure interaction of +0.0296.
Exploratory gilteritinib by unfit interaction was +0.0191 but did not reach 0.05.
Exploratory ivosidenib by unfit interaction was -0.0245 but did not reach 0.05.
